title: The latest uptick of Baltic indices was not only heartening but also imperative
section_path: The latest uptick of Baltic indices was not only heartening but also imperative
section_path_text: The latest uptick of Baltic indices was not only heartening but also imperative
summary:
The latest uptick of Baltic indices was not only heartening but also imperative. By Michalis Voutsinas
"Having spent a good part of the current trading year competing with the splendid 2021 performance, Baltic Dry Index had a first-six-month average of 2279 points - very similar to the one of the previous year. However, July and August had a very different story to narrate.
